name: EDI Central Tracking — Operations Tool
hypothesis: Ops users will adopt a self-service EDI order tracker inside BEES one Link admin instead of contacting support.

metrics.name: Triage-to-resolution flow
metrics.threshold: ≥ 50% of sessions that open ≥ 1 item page also complete ≥ 1 reprocess in the same session

metrics.name: Time to first reprocess
metrics.threshold: Median < 90s from pageview on #orders to first reprocess_triggered

metrics.name: Structured filter adoption
metrics.threshold: ≥ 70% of sessions apply ≥ 1 filter before opening any order

metrics.name: Bulk reprocess workflow
metrics.threshold: ≥ 25% of sessions that reprocess anything use the bulk path (≥ 2 orders)

metrics.name: Multi-feature depth
metrics.threshold: ≥ 40% of sessions use ≥ 3 of: filter, drawer, item page, bulk reprocess

name: Notification Center — V1
hypothesis: Users who have a centralized notification center will act on alerts faster, reducing missed actions.
metric: ≥ 60% of testers click the notification bell and mark at least one item as read within 60 seconds
